overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk city environment, ascending pedestrian walkways to reveal panoramic neon-lit cityscapes of Night City, then traversing covered corridors. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring dense urban architecture, flying vehicles, and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior concrete stairwell of pedestrian overpass

events.description: ascending stairs reveals the open cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs of a pedestrian overpass structure toward the city view

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow safety striping on edges
smooth concrete handrail with wooden top surface
large pink neon billboard featuring a woman's face with FEEL THE CHEMISTRY text
raw concrete walls with horizontal wooden trim

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered concrete stairwell, ascending toward an opening. As the camera climbs, the pink neon billboard becomes visible, and the sprawling cyberpunk city skyline gradually reveals itself in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city overlook with panoramic views

events.description: slow panning motion to survey the sprawling neon-lit cityscape

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook panning across the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape, taking in the panoramic view

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers with countless neon signs and illuminated windows
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure arching overhead
futuristic cars flying between buildings with light trails
multi-level street intersection with moving traffic and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the elevated overlook, the camera pans across a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk metropolis. Flying vehicles traverse between towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements, while the elevated metro structure frames the scene overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved exterior walkway with city views

events.description: turning right to follow the curved walkway along the building edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved concrete walkway with views of the street and traffic below

entered.detail: concrete safety railing with metal handrail following the curve of the building
view down to the street level showing moving vehicles and street lights
adjacent building covered in glowing advertisements and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Moving along the curved exterior walkway, the camera follows the building's edge with the street visible below. The perspective shifts to show the building's neon-covered facade while the distant skyline moves out of direct view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with street openings

events.description: moving into more enclosed covered walkway section with overhead beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway with periodic views of the street below through openings

entered.detail: concrete roof structure with exposed beams providing partial cover
massive concrete support pillars and overhead highway structure
concrete wall with red and white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian bridge with heavy concrete architecture. Overhead highway beams dominate the view while openings in the structure provide glimpses of the street traffic below. Graffiti appears on the interior walls as the lighting becomes more artificial.

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in the same direction through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit interior corridor and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction through the corridor wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: enclosed concrete hallway with debris scattered on the floor
thick structural concrete pillars supporting the ceiling
harsh fluorescent tube lights mounted on the concrete ceiling

segments.scene_description: Entering the fully enclosed interior corridor, the lighting shifts to harsh fluorescent tubes. The camera passes by other pedestrians walking through the dim concrete passage, with structural pillars and scattered debris visible along the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a confined concrete stairwell into a sprawling neon metropolis before retreating back into a dim, industrial interior. It begins by climbing toward an opening where a pink neon billboard first appears, gradually revealing a vast cyberpunk skyline in the distance. As the camera emerges onto an elevated overlook, the view expands into a breathtaking panorama of towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles framed by an overhead metro structure. The perspective then shifts along a curved exterior walkway, following the building's neon-covered facade before transitioning into a covered pedestrian bridge dominated by heavy concrete beams and graffiti. Finally, the scene moves into a fully enclosed interior corridor where the lighting shifts to harsh fluorescent tubes, passing by pedestrians and structural pillars in a dim, debris-strewn passage.
